testcase.failure:
tmp_path = WindowsPath('C:/Users/khams008/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-khams008/pytest-84/test_semantic_dry_run_bug0')
def test_semantic_dry_run_bug(tmp_path): sf = tmp_path / "guided_1234_state.json" sf.write_text(json.dumps({ "workflow_id": "1234", "label": "test", "pid": 123, "state_path": str(sf), "current_stage": "validation_recorded", "dry_run": True }))
report = generate_failure_report(state_path=str(sf), probe_dir_str=str(tmp_path)) assert report.detected_failure_type == "semantic_dry_run_bug" > assert any("validation_recorded reached during dry_run=True" in e for e in report.errors) E assert False E + where False = any(<generator object test_semantic_dry_run_bug.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x000001B45B9D9E50>)
tests\test_failure_report.py:130: AssertionError
